calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Continued To Oct-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant April Foster's motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted.

The parties entered into an enforceable arbitration agreement that covers this dispute, and Plaintiff JP Morgan Chase Bank, N.A. does not substantively oppose the motion. The Parties' arbitration agreement provides: "Under this agreement to arbitrate, the party filing a Claim must select either Judicial Arbitration and Mediation Services ("JAMS") or the American Arbitration Association ('AAA") as the arbitration administrator." (Complaint, Ex. A, pg. 10.) The court compels the parties to arbitrate before AAA since plaintiff is the claimant. The court stays this action under Code of Civil Procedure section 1281.4.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
